Title: Staff Engineer
Description: Operating as an internal technical co-founder driving "Zero-to-One" generative AI, speech intelligence, and real-time voice translation platforms from conceptual R&D to enterprise-ready General Availability (GA). Architecting high-throughput asynchronous execution layers, multi-track audio orchestration pipelines, and parallelized multi-agent AI development workflows that scale to support hundreds of thousands of live operational requests across global markets.

Title: Software Engineer
Description: Spearheaded cloud-native backend infrastructures, serverless telemetry pipelines, and secure healthcare data exchange systems on Google Cloud Platform (GCP) for advanced medical robotics deployments. Pioneered the integration of generative LLMs and OpenAI assistant APIs to automate multi-tiered UI, API, and clinical requirement verification, significantly slashing release latencies while maintaining strict HIPAA compliance.

Title: Senior Engineer
Description: Delivered mechanical tool development, precision manufacturing design, and structure configuration for high-stakes industrial locomotive and mass transit infrastructure projects. Managed the end-to-end design and structural fabrication of heavy-duty installation fixtures, lifters, and templates deployed across major municipal networks including the Perth, Mumbai, and Singapore Metro lines.

Title: Founder
Description: Founded and scaled a bootstrapped consumer electronics enterprise specializing in chip-level hardware diagnostics, component repairs, and operating logistics. Expanded business throughput to manage over 1,000 devices and 100+ customers monthly while maintaining a 4.7+ customer satisfaction rating across multiple public platforms. Internally engineered custom inventory tracking and device monitoring ledger software, developing early foundational database structures that streamlined operational turnaround times.

Title: Lead Project Engineer
Description: Directed the end-to-end mechanical engineering, 3D kinematic modeling, and tool proving of ultra-high-precision jigs, fixtures, and structural components for premier aerospace, defense, and nuclear energy entities. Accountable for cross-functional project management, vendor liaisons, and technical design packages supporting crucial programs for ISRO, Safran, Air India, and Bharat Electronics.

Title: Trainee Engineer
Description: Contributed to the mechanical design, optimization, and drafting of primary and secondary structures for the landmark Airbus A350 XWB aviation program. Developed structural installation brackets, generated manufacturing-ready engineering packages (DFM), and configured precision electrical harness routing parameters mapped against rigorous international aerospace safety and flight test standards.
